title: Nizam Phase Definition Schema
description: Validates a phase definition (the structured document produced from templates/phase_template.yaml). Implements DD-3, Evidence Externalisation: every step records its proof as a file path under '.agent/evidence/' rather than as pasted-in terminal output. Both the phase-level and step-level objects declare 'additionalProperties: false' over an explicit, closed property set that intentionally omits any inline free-text output field (for example 'proof', 'raw_output', 'terminal_output', 'console_output', 'stdout', or 'output'), so a phase document that tries to smuggle raw terminal output into an unrecognised key is rejected rather than silently tolerated as an unknown extension property.

description.description: Summary of what the phase delivers.

status.description: Current lifecycle state of the phase.

steps.description: The ordered, atomic steps that make up the phase.

id.description: Unique step identifier within the phase, e.g. '01.1'.

status.description: Current lifecycle state of the step.

evidence.description: Path to the externalised evidence file proving this step's completion. MUST reference a file under '.agent/evidence/'; raw terminal output MUST NEVER be pasted directly into this or any other field.

docs_updated.description: Path to the documentation file updated as part of this step, populated before the step may be marked COMPLETED.

changelog_entry.description: One-line CHANGELOG.md summary for this step, populated before the step may be marked COMPLETED.
